hero.subtitle: No follower count. No language barrier.
hero.description1: A platform connecting curated K-beauty brands with nano & micro influencers across Southeast Asia.
hero.description2: From 1,000 followers · Collaborate seamlessly in your own language.

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: PICKIN was built to solve exactly these problems
painPoints.card1Title: You DM brands. Most don't reply.
painPoints.card1Problem: You reach out, wait, follow up, and wait again. Real collaboration offers rarely come your way.
painPoints.card1Solution: With PICKIN, brands find you first and send collaboration offers directly.
painPoints.card2Title: International brands feel out of reach.
painPoints.card2Problem: Language barriers mean missed opportunities. Mistranslations break deals before they even start.
painPoints.card2Solution: PICKIN lets you communicate with brands in your own language, seamlessly.
painPoints.card3Problem: You apply for campaigns and get turned down because of follower count. Your real influence goes unnoticed.
painPoints.card3Solution: Every brand on PICKIN specifically wants nano and micro creators — that means you.

validation.title: 1,000 followers is enough.
validation.subtitle: Small following. Real influence.
validation.description: Nano influencers drive higher purchase conversion than mega celebrities. Brands already know this. PICKIN was built around this truth.

howItWorks.title: 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subtitle: Register and wait. PICKIN handles the rest.
howItWorks.step1Description: Enter your SNS account, country, and platform. Done in under a minute.
howItWorks.step2Description: After launch, our AI analyzes your content style, engagement, and audience to build your creator profile.
howItWorks.step3Description: Brands on PICKIN browse your profile and send collaboration offers. You decide what to accept.

earlyAccess.title: Why you should register now
earlyAccess.subtitle: Exclusive benefits for early creators only
earlyAccess.item1Desc: Waitlist members get first access to brand campaigns the moment PICKIN launches. More brands, less competition.
earlyAccess.item2Title: Free During Beta — No Hidden Fees
earlyAccess.item2Desc: Beta members use all platform features completely free. No subscription. No commission cut.
earlyAccess.item3Desc: Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Filipino, and English are all supported. Collaborate with brands without a translator.

waitlist.title: Register in 30 seconds
waitlist.description1: Be among the first Southeast Asian creators on PICKIN.
waitlist.betaBenefit: Free beta access + Priority matching + First invite at official launch
waitlist.trustNote: No spam. No fees. Just early access.

form.name: Name
form.successMessage: You're in! We'll reach out soon.
